working_on: Cleanup-batch session: close 3 health-check-finding Issues (#50 hook env-pointer worktree fallback, #55 audit_mempalace [pushback]/[lesson] content-prefix matching, #51 new audit_orphan_ok_list() per cascade-discipline.md commitment). Issue #50: extend session-start.sh env-pointer probe (lines 262-294) to fall back to parent main repo .env via git rev-parse --git-common-dir + dirname when worktree .env is absent or lacks SUPABASE_DB_URL; preserve LOUD pointer when neither location carries the URL (Issue #7 / S-0048 contract). Issue #55: extend audit_mempalace() pushback/lesson counter loop in health_check.py (lines 1140-1176) to also match drawers whose first non-empty content line begins with [pushback]/[lesson] (case-insensitive); deduplicate with existing Tags-line match; preserve existing path. Issue #51: add new audit_orphan_ok_list() function to health_check.py walking engine/adr/[0-9]*.md and product/adr/[0-9]*.md, parsing - **Orphan-OK:** <reason>; revisit at <S-NNNN-or-Phase-N> annotations on Accepted ADRs, comparing trigger against register_state.json:last_claimed (session-id) or STATE.md current-phase (phase trigger), surfacing stale annotations as findings; wire into main(); empty-corpus today by design. Pytest extensions for all three. Layer 1 contract docstring on the new function per ADR 0038. Layer 3 cold-context review at shutdown. Standard close: STATE.md, ENGINE_LOG.md, archive S-0099.json, MemPalace diary write, validate.py 0 hard-fails.
